notes: Trace merge now writes an inspectable duplicate audit CSV whenever duplicate rows are removed.
Duplicate audit files are written under data/logs as trace_duplicates_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.csv.
The Trace merge result table and console output now show the duplicate audit path.
Audit rows include row hash, duplicate stage, source file, run ID, Tid, Varenr, GTIN, SSCCs, user, customer, and order fields.
TraceCollector, AS400, dedupe rules, ledger logic, and canonical Trace schema are unchanged.
